message:
Use RAII ReentrancyGuard for two-way binding sync flag

Replace manual guard_ab.set(false)/guard_ba.set(false) with a
drop-based ReentrancyGuard to ensure the syncing flag is always
cleared even if the inner .set() call panics. Prevents permanent
deadlock of the two-way binding in the face of unexpected panics
during value propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
